commands.review_summary:
The branch carries scanned-PDF page images from media understanding into transient current-turn image inputs for normal reply and ACP dispatch, with regression tests and docs wording updates.

PR surface: Source +49, Tests +116, Docs 0. Total +165 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main has a clear path where extractFileContentFromSource can return PDF images and extractFileBlocks converts them into a placeholder-only text block on the chat media-understanding path.
